name: Evolution Mining Limited
analysis: EVN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 30% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$12.3500, stop A$10.1029, target A$13.6600 (0.58:1) — then trail it.
